criteria_verification.evidence: Turn 2 fixes: (a) Replaced `from datetime import datetime, timezone` with `from datetime import UTC, datetime` and switched `_now_utc()` to `datetime.now(UTC)` to clear UP017. (b) Added a `# noqa: UP040` to the `StubResponse: TypeAlias` declaration with an inline comment explaining that switching to PEP-695 `type` keyword would silently break the TASK-J002-007 swap-point contract tests (`get_args(dispatch.StubResponse)` requires the variants to be reachable directly, not via `__value__`). (c) Applied `ruff format` to dispatch.py and tests/test_dispatch_by_capability.py. issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `the stack-specific Phase-3 specialist` (Implementation)

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent tests failed due to high-confidence infrastructure dependency (Docker unavailable). Task declares required infrastructure. Conditionally approved — independent tests skipped. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 1182 chars provided.
